terms.definition: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit — a placeholder definition showing how a glossary hover card renders. Inline math works: $s(u)$.
Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore — a second placeholder entry, referenced from the first via seeAlso.
